vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi toàn diện về công nghệ
vocab.example: The most striking difference is the technological overhaul, where traditional chalkboards have been replaced by interactive smart displays.

vocab.meaning: sự đa dạng của các hoạt động ngoại khóa
vocab.example: The school now offers immense extracurricular breadth, ranging from competitive coding clubs to mindfulness meditation sessions.

vocab.meaning: không gian làm việc nhóm/hợp tác
vocab.example: Individual wooden desks have given way to flexible, collaborative workspaces designed to encourage peer-to-peer learning.

vocab.meaning: trải qua một đợt tân trang/cải thiện diện mạo
vocab.example: The campus has undergone a major facelift, with vibrant murals and modern glass architecture replacing the drab gray corridors of my youth.

vocab.meaning: học tập liên ngành (kết hợp nhiều môn học)
vocab.example: The curriculum has pivoted toward interdisciplinary learning, allowing students to explore the intersection of science and the arts.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở hạ tầng thân thiện với môi trường
vocab.example: I was impressed to see the new eco-friendly infrastructure, such as rainwater harvesting systems and rooftop solar arrays.

vocab.meaning: sự chăm sóc đời sống tinh thần và tình cảm cho học sinh
vocab.example: There is a much stronger emphasis on pastoral care now, with dedicated counselors available to support students' mental wellbeing.

vocab.meaning: chế độ/hệ thống thi cử chuẩn hóa
vocab.example: While the standardized testing regime is still in place, it seems less rigid than the constant high-stakes exams we used to endure.
The school has recently cultivated a robust alumni network to provide current students with mentorship and internship opportunities.

vocab.meaning: lượng học sinh đầu vào đa dạng (về văn hóa, sắc tộc...)
vocab.example: The student body reflects a more diverse intake, fostering a global perspective that was largely absent when I was a child.
